description: Ground truth Q&A pairs for Meridian Capital Group RAG pipeline evaluation

pairs.question: How many PTO days does a new employee receive in their first year?
pairs.expected_answer: 15 days

pairs.question: When can a new employee start using their accrued PTO?
pairs.expected_answer: After completing 90 days of service

pairs.question: How many PTO days can an employee carry over into the next calendar year?
pairs.expected_answer: A maximum of 10 unused PTO days

pairs.question: How much advance notice is required when requesting 4 consecutive days of PTO?
pairs.expected_answer: A minimum of 5 business days in advance

pairs.question: How many sick days does an employee receive per year and do they carry over?
pairs.expected_answer: Employees receive 7 sick days per calendar year. Sick leave does not carry over.

pairs.question: How many weeks of paid parental leave does a primary caregiver receive?
pairs.expected_answer: 16 weeks of fully paid parental leave

pairs.question: What is the eligibility requirement for parental leave?
pairs.expected_answer: Employees must have completed at least 12 months of continuous service

pairs.question: Does the company continue retirement contributions while an employee is on parental leave?
pairs.expected_answer: Yes, employees on parental leave continue to receive full benefits including health insurance, retirement contributions, and equity vesting

pairs.question: How many paid bereavement days does an employee receive for the loss of a grandparent?
pairs.expected_answer: 3 paid days

pairs.question: How many days does the company cover for jury duty?
pairs.expected_answer: Up to 15 business days at full regular pay

pairs.question: How long can an employee take an unpaid leave of absence?
pairs.expected_answer: Up to 90 days

pairs.question: What is the employee monthly premium for the Gold health insurance plan?
pairs.expected_answer: $220 per month

pairs.question: When does health insurance coverage begin for a new employee who starts on March 15?
pairs.expected_answer: Coverage begins on April 1, the first day of the month following their start date

pairs.question: What is the annual allowance for frames or contact lenses under the vision plan?
pairs.expected_answer: $200 per calendar year

pairs.question: What is the maximum company 401(k) match as a percentage of base salary?
pairs.expected_answer: 5% of base salary per year

pairs.question: What percentage of the company 401(k) match is vested after 2 years of service?
When are annual performance bonuses paid out?
pairs.expected_answer: In February following the performance year

pairs.question: What is the target bonus range for a Vice President?
pairs.expected_answer: 30% to 50% of base salary

pairs.question: How do RSUs vest for eligible employees?
pairs.expected_answer: Over a 4-year period with a 1-year cliff — 25% vests after the first year and the remaining 75% vests quarterly over the following 3 years

pairs.question: What is the annual professional development budget per employee?
pairs.expected_answer: $2,500 per year

pairs.question: How many free therapy sessions per year does the EAP provide?
pairs.expected_answer: Up to 12 free therapy sessions per year through Lyra Health

pairs.question: What is the maximum annual gym and wellness reimbursement?
pairs.expected_answer: Up to $600 per year

pairs.question: How often are employees paid and is direct deposit required?
pairs.expected_answer: Employees are paid bi-weekly (26 pay periods per year) and direct deposit is required

pairs.question: When does the mid-year performance review take place and does it result in a salary change?
pairs.expected_answer: The mid-year review is conducted in July and does not result in compensation changes

pairs.question: What performance rating is required to be considered for a promotion?
pairs.expected_answer: A rating of 4 or above in the most recent annual review

pairs.question: What happens to an employee who receives a rating of 2 in their annual review?
pairs.expected_answer: They will be placed on a formal Performance Improvement Plan (PIP) within 30 days of the review

pairs.question: What merit increase range can an employee expect if they receive an Exceptional rating?
pairs.expected_answer: Between 6% and 10%

pairs.question: When do merit increases from the annual review take effect?
pairs.expected_answer: Effective March 1 of the following year

pairs.question: How long must an employee be in their current role before being considered for promotion?
pairs.expected_answer: A minimum of 18 months

pairs.question: What are the four core values of Meridian Capital Group?
pairs.expected_answer: Integrity, Excellence, Accountability, and Inclusion

pairs.question: How can an employee anonymously report harassment or discrimination?
pairs.expected_answer: Through the Ethics Hotline at 1-800-555-0192 or online at ethics.meridiancapitalgroup.com

pairs.question: What must an employee do before taking on outside consulting work with a competitor?
pairs.expected_answer: Submit an Outside Business Activity Request form in Workday for pre-approval by the Compliance team

pairs.question: What are the steps in the disciplinary process in order?
pairs.expected_answer: Verbal warning, written warning, Performance Improvement Plan, suspension with or without pay, and termination

pairs.question: Can an employee discuss client portfolios in a public setting?
pairs.expected_answer: No, employees may not discuss client portfolios or transactions in public settings as this violates the firm's confidentiality policy

pairs.question: What is the monthly pre-tax commuter benefit limit?
pairs.expected_answer: Up to $315 per month toward transit or parking expenses
